title: Explore SwiftUI
description: Latest SwiftUI elements added to the library

group_descriptions.Buttons: API xoay quanh Button, buttonStyle, buttonBorderShape, role, tint, RenameButton, PasteButton; iOS 26 thêm buttonSizing và glass/glassProminent style.
group_descriptions.Toolbars: API mới iOS 26 cho title placement (.title/.subtitle/.largeTitle/.largeSubtitle), ToolbarSpacer(.fixed/.flexible), và sharedBackgroundVisibility.
group_descriptions.Sliders: nền tảng là Slider + step; iOS 26 thêm tick system (SliderTick, SliderTickContentForEach) để có mốc và label tick.
group_descriptions.Pickers: 1 API Picker, nhiều style (inline/menu/navigationLink/palette/segmented/wheel/radioGroup), thêm bố cục radio theo chiều ngang, và currentValueLabel ở API đời mới.
group_descriptions.Date Pickers: DatePicker theo components/style (wheel/graphical/field/stepperField), range ngày (in:), và MultiDatePicker cho chọn nhiều ngày.
group_descriptions.Gauges: Gauge với nhiều style (linear/circular/accessory...), hỗ trợ current/min/max label, tint/color.
group_descriptions.Progress Views: ProgressView dạng linear/circular, có label và tint/styling.
group_descriptions.Content Unavailable Views: UI trạng thái rỗng, gồm custom variant và search variant (ContentUnavailableView.search).
group_descriptions.Menus: Menu, Section, Divider, menu lồng nhau, menuOrder(.fixed) và contextMenu (kể cả preview).
group_descriptions.View That Fits: fallback layout tự động theo không gian hiển thị (ưu tiên view đầu tiên fit được).
group_descriptions.Dividers: divider cơ bản, màu, chiều cao, và vertical usage trong HStack.
group_descriptions.Lists: nhóm lớn nhất; gồm style list, separators, row/background/insets/spacing, swipe/refresh, badge, edit/move/delete control, section index, outline/disclosure.
group_descriptions.Group Boxes: GroupBox cơ bản, có label, có backgroundStyle.
group_descriptions.Scroll Views: iOS 26 có scrollEdgeEffectStyle(.hard) để edge effect cứng.
group_descriptions.Colors: semantic/system colors, UIKit bridge colors (Color(.separator/.label/...)), gradient/opacity variants.
group_descriptions.Material: material styles (ultraThin/thin/regular/thick/...) dùng cho foreground/background effect.
group_descriptions.Links: Link, ShareLink, HelpLink, TextFieldLink, kèm custom preview item cho share.
group_descriptions.Tab Views: nhóm rất rộng; gồm Tab/TabSection, value-tab, search role, tabViewStyle variants (page/sidebarAdaptable/tabBarOnly/grouped), customization APIs, sidebar header/footer/bottombar, iOS 26 thêm bottom accessory + minimize tab bar on scroll.
group_descriptions.Views: generic view-level APIs như containerBackground, controlSize, backgroundExtensionEffect, glassEffect.
group_descriptions.Glass Effect Containers: container iOS 26 để gom nhiều glass elements và tối ưu compositing.
group_descriptions.Shapes: ContainerRelativeShape cho shape bám theo container context.
group_descriptions.Labels: Label với system image/custom image và label styles.
group_descriptions.Labeled Content: cặp “title-value” cho form/list, có formatted value và custom content.
group_descriptions.Concentric Rectangles: shape iOS 26 với concentric corners (uniform/non-uniform) cho style mới.

items.title: Button Sizing
items.description: The preferred sizing behavior of buttons in the view hierarchy.
items.code:
HStack {
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        .buttonSizing(.fitted)
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        .buttonSizing(.flexible)
}

items.title: Tab View Customization Behavior
items.description: Configures the customization behavior of customizable tab view content.

items.title: Tab View Customization
items.description: Specifies the customizations to apply to the sidebar representation of the tab view.

items.title: Tab View Side Bar Footer
items.description: Adds a custom footer to the sidebar of a tab view.

items.title: Tab View Side Bar Bottom Bar
items.description: Adds a custom bottom bar to the sidebar of a tab view.

items.title: Default Adaptable Tab Bar Placement
items.description: Specifies the default placement for the tabs in a tab view using the adaptable sidebar style.

items.title: Tab Bar Section Actions
items.description: Adds custom actions to a tab section.

items.title: Tab View Side Bar Header
items.description: Adds a custom header to the sidebar of a tab view.

items.title: GroupedTabViewStyle
items.description: A tab view style that displays a tab bar that groups its tabs together.

items.title: Tab Badge
items.description: Generates a badge for a tab from an integer value.

items.title: Hidden Index PageTabViewStyle
items.description: A TabViewStyle that displays a paged scrolling TabView with a hidden index.

items.title: PageTabViewStyle
items.description: A TabViewStyle that displays a paged scrolling TabView.

items.title: VerticalPageTabViewStyle
items.description: A TabViewStyle that displays a vertical TabView interaction and appearance.

items.title: SidebarAdaptableTabViewStyle
items.description: A tab bar style that adapts to each platform.

items.title: TabSection
items.description: A container that you can use to add hierarchy within a tab view.

items.title: TabBarOnlyTabViewStyle
items.description: A tab view style that displays a tab bar when possible.

items.title: TabView
items.description: Creates Tabs with title, image, systemImage and custom Label.

items.title: Search Tab Role
items.description: On Liquid Glass, this tab is placed in its own group. In left-to-right (LTR) layouts, it will always appear on the right side of the TabView.

items.title: Value Tab View
items.description: Creates a tab view that uses a builder to create and specify selection values for its tabs.

items.title: Wheel Picker Item Height
items.description: Sets the default wheel-style picker item height.

items.title: Horizontal Radio Group Layout
items.description: Sets the style for radio group style pickers within this view to be horizontally positioned with the radio buttons inside the layout.

items.title: WheelPickerStyle
items.description: A picker style that presents the options in a scrollable wheel that shows the selected option and a few neighboring options.

items.title: SegmentedPickerStyle
items.description: A picker style that presents the options in a segmented control. Use this style when there are two to five options. Consider using menu when there are more than five options.

items.title: PalettePickerStyle
items.description: A picker style that presents the options as a row of compact elements. When used outside of menus, this style is rendered as a segmented picker. If that is the intended usage, consider segmented instead.

items.title: RadioGroupPickerStyle
items.description: A picker style that presents the options as a group of radio buttons.

items.title: NavigationLinkPickerStyle
items.description: A picker style represented by a navigation link that presents the options by pushing a List-style picker view.

items.title: MenuPickerStyle
items.description: A picker style that presents the options as a menu when the user presses a button, or as a submenu when nested within a larger menu.

items.title: InlinePickerStyle
items.description: A PickerStyle where each option is displayed inline with other views in the current container.

items.title: Picker Section
items.description: A Section inside a Picker

items.title: Picker Divider
items.description: A Picker with a Divider

items.title: Custom Value Label Picker
items.description: Creates a picker that generates its label from a localized string key and accepts a custom current value label.

items.title: Multiple Sources Picker
items.description: Creates a picker that updates the selected property for all sources.

items.title: Picker
items.description: Creates a pickers with title, image, systemImage, and custom label.

items.title: Navigation Split View Container Background
items.description: A background placement behind the content of a NavigationSplitView.

items.title: Navigation Container Background
items.description: Sets the container background of the enclosing container using a view.

items.title: Uniform Concentric Rectangle
items.description: Create a rectangle with the same corner style set on four corners.

items.title: Concentric Rectangle
items.description: A concentric rectangle whose corner radii are defined from the same circle center as its parent element. The outermost parent is the device frame.

items.title: Custom Labeled Content
items.description: Creates a standard labeled element, with a view that conveys the value of the element and a label.

items.title: Formatted Labeled Content
items.description: Creates a labeled informational view from a formatted value.

items.title: Labeled Content
items.description: Creates a labeled informational view.

items.title: Label Styles
items.description: Sets the style for labels within this view.
items.code:
VStack {
    Label("Foo", systemImage: "water.waves")
        .labelStyle(.titleAndIcon)
    Label("Foo", systemImage: "water.waves")
        .labelStyle(.titleOnly)
    Label("Foo", systemImage: "water.waves")
        .labelStyle(.iconOnly)
}

items.title: Custom Label
items.description: Creates a label with a custom title and icon.

items.title: Image Label
items.description: Creates a label with an icon image and a title generated from a localized string.
items.code: Label("Foo", image: .cats)

items.title: System Image Label
items.description: Creates a label with a system icon image and a title generated from a localized string.
items.code: Label("Foo", systemImage: "water.waves")

items.title: Disable Sheet Dismiss Swipe
items.description: Conditionally prevents interactive dismissal of presentations like popovers, sheets, and inspectors. Dragging the sheet is still possible to a limited extent, as shown in the screenshot, but it will never be dismissed.

items.title: Page Screen Sheet Size
items.description: On devices smaller than a page of paper, such as iPhone, Apple Watch, and 8" or 11" iPads, the sheet fills the entire height and, unlike the default sheet on iPad, the full width. On macOS, .page behaves like .fitted.

items.title: Fitted Sheet Sizing
items.description: Sets the sizing of the containing presentation. This does not have any effect on smaller devices like iPhone and Apple Watch. On macOS, fitted is the default.

items.title: Sheet Corner Radius
items.description: Requests that the presentation have a specific corner radius.

items.title: Prioritize Sheet Content Scrolling
items.description: Configures the behavior of swipe gestures on a presentation. PresentationContentInteraction.scrolls prioritizes scrolling the content over resizing the sheet.

items.title: Sheet Background Interaction
items.description: Controls whether people can interact with the view behind a presentation.

items.title: Sheet Background
items.description: Sets the presentation background of the enclosing sheet using a shape style.

items.title: Sheet Drag Indicator Visibility
items.description: Sets the visibility of the drag indicator on top of a sheet.

items.title: Sheet Size
items.description: Sets the available detents for the enclosing sheet.

items.title: Item Sheet
items.description:
Presents a sheet using the given item as a data source for the sheet’s content.

On watchOS, sheets are displayed as fullScreenCover.

items.title: Boolean Sheet
items.description:
Presents a sheet when a binding to a Boolean value that you provide is true.

On watchOS, sheets are displayed as fullScreenCover.

items.title: Role Button With Default Label
items.description: Creates a button that displays a default label.

items.title: SliderTickContentForEach
items.description: A type of slider content that creates content by iterating over a collection.

items.title: Outline Group
items.description: A structure that computes views and disclosure groups on demand from an underlying collection of tree-structured, identified data.

items.title: Disclosure Group
items.description: A view that shows or hides another content view, based on the state of a disclosure control.

items.title: Edit Button
items.description: A button that toggles the edit mode environment value.

items.title: Section Index Label and Visibility
items.description:
Sets the label that is used in a section index to point to this section, typically only a single character long.
Changes the visibility of the list section index.

items.title: Move Disabled
items.description: Adds a condition for whether the view’s view hierarchy is movable.

items.title: Delete Disabled
items.description: Adds a condition for whether the view’s view hierarchy is deletable.

items.title: Refreshable List
items.description: Marks this view as refreshable.

items.title: Swipe Action
items.description: Adds custom swipe actions to a row in a list.

items.title: List Badge Prominence
items.description: Specifies the prominence of badges created by this view.

items.title: List Badge
items.description: Generates a badge for the view from an integer value.

items.title: List Background Prominence
items.description: The prominence of the background underneath views associated with this environment.

items.title: List Row Background
items.description: Places a custom background view behind a list row item.

items.title: Hidden List Row Separator
items.description: Sets the display mode to hidden for the separator associated with this specific row.

items.title: Hidden List Section Separator
items.description: Sets whether to hide the separator associated with a list section.

items.title: List Section Separator Tint
items.description: Sets the tint color associated with a section.

items.title: List Row Separator Tint
items.description: Sets the tint color associated with a row.

items.title: List Item Tint
items.description: Sets a fixed tint color for content in a list.

items.title: List Section Margins
items.description: Set the section margins for the specific edges.

items.title: Compact List Section Spacing
items.description: Compact spacing between sections

items.title: Custom List Section Spacing
items.description: Sets the spacing between adjacent sections in a List to a custom value.

items.title: List Row Spacing
items.description: Sets the vertical spacing between two adjacent rows in a List.

items.title: Default Min List Header Height
items.description: The default minimum height of a header in a list.

items.title: Default Min List Row Height
items.description: The default minimum height of rows in a list.

items.title: List Row Insets
items.description: Applies an inset to the rows in a list.

items.title: Increased Header Prominence
items.description: Sets the header prominence to increased for this view.

items.title: SidebarListStyle
items.description: The list style that describes the behavior and appearance of a sidebar list.

items.title: InsetGroupedListStyle
items.description: The list style that describes the behavior and appearance of an inset grouped list.

items.title: InsetGroupedListStyle
items.description: The list style that describes the behavior and appearance of an inset grouped list.

items.title: InsetListStyle
items.description: The list style that describes the behavior and appearance of an inset list.

items.title: EllipticalListStyle
items.description: The list style that describes the behavior and appearance of an elliptical list.

items.title: CarouselListStyle
items.description: The carousel list style.

items.title: BorderedListStyle
items.description: The list style that describes the behavior and appearance of a list with standard border.

items.title: Text Format
items.description: Creates a text view that displays the formatted representation of a nonstring type supported by a corresponding format style.

items.title: ContainerRelativeShape
items.description: A shape that is replaced by an inset version of the current container shape. If no container shape was defined, is replaced by a rectangle

items.title: ControlSize
items.description: A control version that is the default size
items.code:
VStack {
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        .controlSize(.mini)
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        .controlSize(.small)
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        .controlSize(.regular)
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        .controlSize(.large)
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
    // only on visionOS bigger than large
        .controlSize(.extraLarge)

}

items.title: Glass Effect Container
items.description: A view that combines multiple Liquid Glass shapes into a single shape that can morph individual shapes into one another
items.code:
VStack {
  GlassEffectContainer(spacing: 40.0) {
    HStack(spacing: 40.0) {
      Image(systemName: "1.circle")
        .frame(width: 80.0, height: 80.0)
        .font(.system(size: 36))
        .glassEffect()
        .offset(x: 30.0, y: 0.0)

      Image(systemName: "2.circle")
        .frame(width: 80.0, height: 80.0)
        .font(.system(size: 36))
        .glassEffect()
        .offset(x: -30.0, y: 0.0)
    }
  }

  HStack(spacing: 40.0) {
    Image(systemName: "1.circle")
      .frame(width: 80.0, height: 80.0)
      .font(.system(size: 36))
      .glassEffect()
      .offset(x: 30.0, y: 0.0)

    Image(systemName: "2.circle")
      .frame(width: 80.0, height: 80.0)
      .font(.system(size: 36))
      .glassEffect()
      .offset(x: -30.0, y: 0.0)
  }

}

items.title: Title Toolbar Item Placement
items.description: Places content in the title area

items.title: Navigation Subtitle
items.description: Configures the view’s subtitle for purposes of navigation, using a localized string

items.title: ToolbarItem Shared Background Visibility
items.description: Controls the visibility of the glass background effect on items in the toolbar. In certain contexts, such as the navigation bar on iOS and the window toolbar on macOS, toolbar items will be given a glass background effect that is shared with other items in the same logical grouping

items.title: Background Extension Effect
items.description: Adds the background extension effect to the view. The view will be duplicated into mirrored copies which will be placed around the view on any edge with available safe area. Additionally, a blur effect will be applied on top to blur out the copies

items.title: TabView Bottom Accessory Placement
items.description: A placement of the bottom accessory in a tab view. You can use this to adjust the content of the accessory view based on the placement

items.title: Bottom Accessory
items.description: A modifier to place content above the tabs

items.title: Hide Tab Bar On Scroll Down
items.description: Minimize the tab bar when downwards scrolling starts. Minimizing is supported for tab bars on only iPhone

items.title: Glass Button Styles
items.description: A button style that applies glass border artwork based on the button’s context

items.title: Custom Slider Ticks
items.description: Creates a slider to select a value from a given range, subject to a step increment, which displays the provided labels and customizable ticks.

items.title: Glass effect
items.description: Applies the Liquid Glass effect to a view
items.code:
HStack {
  Text("Foo")
    .padding()
    .glassEffect()
  Text("Foo")
    .padding()
    .glassEffect(in: .rect(cornerRadius: 10))
  Text("Foo")
    .padding()
    .glassEffect(.regular.interactive())
  Text("Foo")
    .padding()
    .glassEffect(.regular.tint(.red))
}

items.title: Hard ScrollEdgeEffect
items.description: A scroll edge effect with a hard cutoff and dividing line

items.title: ToolbarSpacer
items.description: A standard space item in toolbars

items.title: ProgressView Colors
items.description: Customizing the colors of the ProgressView

items.title: CircularProgressViewStyle
items.description: The style of a progress view that uses a circular gauge to indicate the partial completion of an activity

items.title: LinearProgressViewStyle
items.description: A progress view that visually indicates its progress using a horizontal bar

items.title: ProgressView
items.description: The different ProgressView initializers

items.title: HelpLink
items.description: A button with a standard appearance that opens app-specific help documentation

items.title: TextFieldLink
items.description: A control that requests text input from the user when pressed

items.title: Custom Preview Item ShareLink
items.description: Creates an instance, with a custom label, that presents the share interface
items.code:
ShareLink(
    "Share Cats",
    item: Image(.cats),
    subject: Text("Cool Photo"),
    message: Text("Check it out!"),
    preview: SharePreview(
        "Derpy Cats",
        image: Image(.cats)
    )
)

items.title: ShareLink
items.description: A view that controls a sharing presentation

items.title: Link
items.description: A control for navigating to a URL
items.code:
Link("Explore SwiftUI", destination: URL(string: "https://exploreswiftui.com")!)
    .environment(\.openURL, OpenURLAction { url in
        print("Open \(url)")
        return .handled
    })

items.title: Divider Height
items.description: Customizing the height of the Divider
items.code:
Divider()
  .frame(height: 5)
  .overlay(.brown)

items.title: Divider Color
items.description: Customizing the color of the Divider
items.code:
Divider()
    .overlay(.blue)

items.title: Vertical Divider
items.description: A vertical visual element that can be used to separate other content

items.title: Divider
items.description: A visual element that can be used to separate other content
items.code: Divider()

items.title: Future DatePicker
items.description: Creates an instance that selects multiple dates on or after some start date

items.title: MultiDatePicker
items.description: A control for picking multiple dates.

items.title: DatePicker Colors
items.description: Customizing the colors of the date picker

items.title: FieldDatePickerStyle
items.description: A date picker style that displays the components in an editable field

items.title: StepperFieldDatePickerStyle
items.description: A system style that displays the components in an editable field, with adjoining stepper that can increment/decrement the selected component

items.title: WheelDatePickerStyle
items.description: A date picker style that displays each component as columns in a scrollable wheel

items.title: GraphicalDatePickerStyle
items.description: A date picker style that displays an interactive calendar or clock

items.title: Hour Minute Seconds DatePicker
items.description: A DatePicker for just hour, minute, and second.

items.title: Future DatePicker
items.description: Creates an instance that selects a Date in a closed range

items.title: DatePicker Components
items.description: A date picker with only one displayed component

items.title: DatePicker
items.description: Creates an instance that selects a Date with an unbounded range

items.title: PaletteControlGroupStyle
items.description: A control group style that presents its content as a palette.

items.title: NavigationControlGroupStyle
items.description: The navigation control group style

items.title: MenuControlGroupStyle
items.description: A control group style that presents its content as a menu when the user presses the control, or as a submenu when nested within a larger menu

items.title: CompactMenuControlGroupStyle
items.description: A control group style that presents its content as a compact menu when the user presses the control, or as a submenu when nested within a larger menu

items.title: ControlGroup
items.description: Creates a new ControlGroup with the specified children

items.title: Slider Color
items.description: Customizing the color of the slider

items.title: Stepped Min Max Label Slider
items.description: Creates a slider to select a value from a given range, subject to a step increment, which displays the provided labels

items.title: Stepped Slider
items.description: Creates a slider to select a value from a given range, subject to a step increment

items.title: Slider
items.description: Creates a slider to select a value from a given range

items.title: Gauge Colors
items.description: Customizing the colors of different styles with minimal effort

items.title: CircularGaugeStyle
items.description: A gauge style that displays an open ring with a marker that appears at a point along the ring to indicate the gauge’s current value

items.title: LinearGaugeStyle
items.description: A gauge style that displays a bar with a marker that appears at a point along the bar to indicate the gauge’s current value

items.title: AccessoryLinearCapacityGaugeStyle
items.description: A gauge style that displays bar that fills from leading to trailing edges as the gauge’s current value increases

items.title: AccessoryLinearGaugeStyle
items.description: A gauge style that displays bar with a marker that appears at a point along the bar to indicate the gauge’s current value

items.title: LinearCapacityGaugeStyle
items.description: A gauge style that displays a bar that fills from leading to trailing edges as the gauge’s current value increases

items.title: AccessoryCircularCapacityGaugeStyle
items.description: A gauge style that displays a closed ring that’s partially filled in to indicate the gauge’s current value

items.title: AccessoryCircularGaugeStyle
items.description: A gauge style that displays an open ring with a marker that appears at a point along the ring to indicate the gauge’s current value

items.title: Min Max Current Value Gauge
items.description: Creates a gauge showing a value within a range and describes the gauge’s current, minimum, and maximum values

items.title: Current Value Gauge
items.description: Creates a gauge showing a value within a range and that describes the gauge’s purpose and current value

items.title: Gauge
items.description: Creates a gauge showing a value within a range and describes the gauge’s purpose and current value

items.title: RenameButton
items.description: A button that triggers a standard rename action

items.title: EditButton
items.description: A button that toggles the edit mode environment value

items.title: PasteButton
items.description: A system button that reads items from the pasteboard and delivers it to a closure.

items.title: Button Tint
items.description: Sets the buttons tint color
items.code:
VStack {
    HStack {
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.plain)
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.borderless)
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.bordered)
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
    }
    .tint(.blue)
    HStack {
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.plain)
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.borderless)
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.bordered)
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
    }
    .tint(.red)
    HStack {
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.plain)
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.borderless)
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.bordered)
        Button("Tap Me", action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
    }
    .tint(.green)
}

items.title: Button Roles
items.description: A value that describes the purpose of a button.
items.code:
VStack {
    HStack {
        Button("Tap Me", role: .cancel, action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.plain)
        Button("Tap Me", role: .cancel, action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.borderless)
        Button("Tap Me", role: .cancel, action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.bordered)
        Button("Tap Me", role: .cancel, action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
    }
    HStack {
        Button("Tap Me", role: .destructive, action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.plain)
        Button("Tap Me", role: .destructive, action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.borderless)
        Button("Tap Me", role: .destructive, action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.bordered)
        Button("Tap Me", role: .destructive, action: action)
            .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
    }
}

items.title: Button Border Shape
items.description: A shape used to draw a button’s border.
items.code:
HStack {
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        .buttonBorderShape(.roundedRectangle)
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        .buttonBorderShape(.capsule)
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        .padding()
        .buttonBorderShape(.circle)
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        .buttonBorderShape(.roundedRectangle(radius: 12))
}

items.title: Button Styles
items.description: A type that applies standard interaction behavior and a custom appearance to all buttons within a view hierarchy
items.code:
HStack {
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.plain)
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderless)
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.bordered)
    Button("Tap Me", action: action)
        .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
}

items.description: Three ways to initialize a button

items.description: Set a custom GroupBox background

items.description: A GroupBox with Label

items.title: GroupBox
items.description: A simple GroupBox

items.description: All materials

items.description: A context menu with custom preview

items.title: Color Opacity
items.description: The Color opacity modifier
items.code:
HStack {
  smallRect
    .foregroundStyle(.blue.opacity(1))
  smallRect
    .foregroundStyle(.blue.opacity(0.7))
  smallRect
    .foregroundStyle(.blue.opacity(0.5))
  smallRect
    .foregroundStyle(.blue.opacity(0.3))
  smallRect
    .foregroundStyle(.blue.opacity(0.1))
}

items.title: Color Gradient
items.description: The Color gradient modifier
items.code:
VStack {
  HStack {
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.secondary)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.tertiary)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.quaternary)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.quinary)
  }
  HStack {
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.gradient)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.gradient.secondary)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.gradient.tertiary)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.gradient.quaternary)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.gradient.quinary)
  }
  HStack {
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.gradient.opacity(0.9))
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.gradient.opacity(0.7))
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.gradient.tertiary.opacity(0.5))
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.gradient.quaternary.opacity(0.3))
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue.gradient.quinary.opacity(0.1))
  }
}

  .foregroundStyle(.primary)

items.title: Standard Colors
items.description: The SwiftUI standard colors
items.code:
VStack {
  HStack {
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.black)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.blue)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.brown)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.clear)
  }
  HStack {
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.cyan)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.gray)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.green)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.indigo)
  }
  HStack {
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.mint)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.orange)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.pink)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.purple)
  }
  HStack {
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.red)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.teal)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.white)
    smallRect
      .foregroundStyle(.yellow)
  }
}

items.title: ViewThatFits Vertical
items.description: A view that adapts to the available vertical space by providing the first child view that fits.

items.title: ViewThatFits
items.description: A view that adapts to the available space by providing the first child view that fits.
items.code:
var body: some View {
  VStack(alignment: .leading) {
    testContent
      .background(.red)
      .frame(maxWidth: 300)
    testContent
      .background(.red.secondary)
      .frame(maxWidth: 200)
    testContent
      .background(.red.tertiary)
      .frame(maxWidth: 100)
    testContent
      .background(.red.quaternary)
      .frame(maxWidth: 50)
  }
}

@ViewBuilder
var testContent: some View {
  ViewThatFits {
    Text("Available width 300")
      .frame(width: 300, height: 20)
      .foregroundStyle(.white)
    Text("Available width 200")
      .frame(width: 200, height: 20)
      .foregroundStyle(.white)
    Text("A. w. 100")
      .frame(width: 100, height: 20)
      .foregroundStyle(.white)
    Text("Fallback")
      .frame(width: 80, height: 20)
      .foregroundStyle(.white)
  }
}
